mapper.sql: SELECT t.thesis_id, t.selection_id, t.report_content, t.file_id, f.original_name, t.status, t.inspector_id, ins.real_name AS inspector_name, t.inspect_comment, t.inspect_time, t.version_no, t.create_time, t.update_time, s.student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no, s.topic_id, pt.topic_name, s.custom_topic_name, s.is_custom_topic, s.teacher_id, tea.real_name AS teacher_name, tea.teacher_no, s.campus_name, s.academic_year, s.status AS selection_status FROM thesis_document t LEFT JOIN project_selection s ON t.selection_id = s.selection_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user stu ON s.student_id = stu.user_id AND stu.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_topic pt ON s.topic_id = pt.topic_id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user tea ON s.teacher_id = tea.user_id AND tea.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user ins ON t.inspector_id = ins.user_id AND ins.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN doc_file f ON t.file_id = f.file_id AND f.is_deleted = 0 WHERE t.is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: AND s.student_id = #{studentId} AND s.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY t.thesis_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM thesis_document WHERE thesis_id = #{thesisId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE thesis_document SET status = #{status}, inspector_id = #{inspectorId}, inspect_comment = #{inspectComment}, inspect_time = #{inspectTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE thesis_id = #{thesisId}
UPDATE thesis_document SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE thesis_id = #{thesisId}
